site.title: YuChiao Chou · Zentangle
site.tagline: Find Your Peace, One Stroke at a Time

manifesto.quoteEn: There are no mistakes, only opportunities.
manifesto.note:
This sentence has walked with me for ten years.
— YuChiao

demo.title: Live: Florz
demo.intro:
Hand the brush to time.
Scroll, and watch each cell grow stroke by stroke.

process.title: Three steps. One breath.
process.step1Desc: Draw a square. Frame the world.
process.step2Desc: Lightly pencil a line — that is the string.
process.step3Desc: In each cell, slowly fill in the pattern.
